how_it_works.title:
The Peelo Chat
<0>User Journey.
how_it_works.subtitle: Peelo Chat is a B2B SaaS platform that allows businesses to build AI Agents for WhatsApp. We operate on a "Freemium" model: users can sign up and build their chatbot for free. A paid subscription is only required when they decide to deploy the agent to a live WhatsApp number or access our advanced proprietary AI engine.

1.title: Free Sign-up & Creation
1.desc: A user creates a free account and accesses the dashboard. They can start building their agent immediately using our visual editor without paying anything.

2.title: Configuration & Griot AI
2.desc: Build your agent for free using our visual logic blocks. Need more power? Activate **Griot AI** (available on 'Smart Agent' plans) to train your assistant with your business documents and let it answer complex queries automatically.

3.title: The Upgrade Trigger
3.desc: The usage remains free during the building phase. When the user is ready to go live, they hit a paywall. They must select a monthly subscription plan (e.g., Smart Agent at $30/mo) to unlock the deployment features.

4.title: WhatsApp Connection
4.desc: Once the plan is active, the deployment process begins. Inside the secure dashboard, the user connects their WhatsApp Business phone number by scanning a QR code or linking their API credentials.

5.title: Live Automation & Top-ups
5.desc: The agent handles customer conversations automatically 24/7. Each plan comes with a monthly allowance of AI credits. If quota is exhausted, users can purchase top-ups directly from the dashboard.

api.label: Visual Flow Builder
api.title:
Imagine. Draw.
<0>Automate.
api.description: No need to be a developer. Build complex customer journeys in a few clicks with our visual editor. Drag, drop, and see your ideas come to life.
api.note: * Actual interface of the Peelo creation studio

faq.title: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.a1: No, Peelo is designed to be accessible to everyone. Our intuitive interface allows you to configure your agent without writing a single line of code.
faq.q2: Can I use my own WhatsApp number?
faq.a2: Yes, you can connect your own number. However, it requires a number not associated with a personal WhatsApp account, or migrating it to the WhatsApp Business app.
faq.a3: A credit generally corresponds to a series of interactions. Our standard plan includes 2,500 credits, which is sufficient to handle a large volume of monthly conversations for an SMB.
faq.a4: At any time, you can take over a conversation from our dashboard. The AI automatically pauses as soon as you intervene.
faq.a5: Yes, we use the official Meta Cloud API (WhatsApp) which adheres to the highest security standards (GDPR). Your customer data is encrypted and we never share it with third parties.

privacy_policy.title: Peelo Privacy Policy
intro: At Peelo, protecting our users' personal data is of paramount importance.

We are committed to ensuring the security and confidentiality of information collected via our WhatsApp chatbot platform. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your information.

s1.title: 1. Scope of this Policy
text: This policy covers how we handle personal data collected when you use our Peelo platform. By "personal data", we mean any information that allows an individual to be directly or indirectly identified.
It does not cover the practices of companies we do not own or control, nor those of people we do not manage.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
text: When you use Peelo, we collect information about you to offer a personalized experience and help you create more effective WhatsApp chatbots. This may include information you provide when creating an account, such as your name, email address, and password. We also collect information about your interactions with our platform, such as:
Messages and Media: We collect messages and media files sent via our chatbots to ensure proper service operation and improve user experience.
User-Provided Data: First name, last name, email address, phone number...
Data from Third Parties: We may receive information from third-party partners, such as payment platforms and analytics services, when you interact with Peelo.

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
list: Provide, manage, and improve our services
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

s4.title: 4. Information Sharing and Disclosure
text: We do not sell or rent your personal data. However, we may share certain information with:
Third-Party Service Providers: Technical partners, hosts, and payment providers who help us deliver Peelo.
Legal Obligations: We may disclose your data if required by law or to respond to government requests.

s5.title: 5. Information Protection
text: We take the security of your information very seriously and have implemented security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, disclosure, loss, or destruction. We have established appropriate physical, electronic, and administrative security procedures to protect your data.

s6.title: 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies
text: We use cookies to improve your experience on our Peelo platform. Cookies are small text files stored on your computer or mobile device that allow our platform to recognize you when you return to our website. Cookies also help us understand how you use our platform and allow us to improve our services accordingly.

s7.title: 7. Your Privacy Rights
list: Withdraw your consent at any time
s7.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@peelo.chat.

s8.title: 8. Children's Privacy
text: Peelo is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect their data. If a parent or guardian discovers that their child has shared information, we will delete it immediately upon request.

s9.title: 9. Account and Data Deletion
text: You may request the deletion of your account and personal data by contacting us at contact@peelo.chat

s10.title: 10. Changes to this Policy
text: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Any significant update will be notified to you via our platform or by email.

s11.title: 11. Contact Us
text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy, contact us at contact@peelo.chat.

s1.title: 1. SUBSCRIPTION CANCELLATION
s1.text: You may cancel your Peelo Chat subscription at any time.
list: How to cancel: You can cancel directly from your account dashboard or by contacting our support team at <1>contact@peelo.chat.

Effect of cancellation: If you cancel, your subscription will stop renewing automatically. You will retain access to the service and your credits until the end of your current billing cycle. No further charges will be applied.

s2.title: 2. REFUND POLICY
s2.text: In accordance with Paddle standards, we offer a 14-day refund period.
list: 14-Day Guarantee: You have 14 days after your initial purchase or renewal to request a full refund if you are not satisfied.
After 14 days: Past this period, no refunds will be granted for the current billing cycle.

s3.title: 3. EXCEPTIONS
s3.text: Refunds may be considered on a case-by-case basis at the sole discretion of Peelo Inc SASU, only in the following specific circumstances:
list: Double Billing: If a technical error resulted in your card being charged twice for the same period.
Service Failure: If the platform was completely inaccessible for an extended period (more than 48 hours) due to a fault on our end.

s4.title: 4. CONTACT US
s4.text: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us at:

cookie_consent.text: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to visit this site you agree to our use of cookies.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.h1_title:
Terms and Conditions
of Peelo Chat
terms.subtitle: Last updated: January 24, 2026

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
content: These Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "Terms") govern the access and use by any user (hereinafter referred to as "the User" or "you") of the Peelo Chat platform, operated by Peelo Inc SASU (hereinafter referred to as "Peelo Chat" or "the Platform").
Peelo Chat allows the creation and deployment of chatbots on WhatsApp as well as the dissemination of broadcast campaigns on WhatsApp.
By registering or accessing Peelo Chat, you accept these Terms in full without reservation.
If you do not accept these Terms, you are not authorized to use the Platform.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
items: Peelo Chat Platform: set of tools, APIs, web interfaces, features and services allowing the creation and management of WhatsApp chatbots and broadcast campaigns.
WhatsApp Chatbot: automated program deployed by the User via Peelo Chat to interact with users on WhatsApp.
Broadcast Campaign: simultaneous and scheduled sending of a message to a list of WhatsApp numbers, managed via the Platform.
User Content: all texts, images, files, messages, scripts and data transmitted, stored or generated by the User or its recipients via Peelo Chat.

access.title: 3. Access and Registration
content: 1. Registration: The User must provide a valid email address, a secure password, and any other information required during account creation. You are solely responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials.

2. WhatsApp Business App Account: To use Peelo Chat, the User must have a phone number registered with WhatsApp Business App. You guarantee that this number belongs to you and complies with WhatsApp's terms of use.
3. Eligibility: You declare that you are of legal age (or have parental authorization if applicable) and have the legal capacity to accept these Terms.

licenses.title: 4. Authorizations and Licenses
content: 1. License granted to the User: Subject to compliance with these Terms, Peelo Chat grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-assignable and revocable right to use the Platform to create, configure and manage your chatbots and broadcast campaigns on WhatsApp.

2. License granted to Peelo Chat: By submitting any User Content (texts, files, scripts, messages, etc.), you grant Peelo Chat a worldwide, non-exclusive and revocable license, limited to the duration necessary for the operation of the Platform. This license strictly allows Peelo Chat to:
- Host your contents on its servers.
- Ensure technical maintenance (backups, updates, incident resolutions).
- Improve and optimize the quality of its services (diagnostics, global and anonymized statistical analyses, usage tests).
Peelo Chat formally undertakes not to:
- Resell your contents or your data to a third party for commercial purposes.
- Exploit them to generate direct revenue (targeted advertising, external monetization).
- Share them with partners or advertisers for prospecting purposes.

Your data is hosted and used solely to ensure the proper functioning, security and continuous improvement of the Peelo Chat Platform. Any use of your contents is strictly limited to the purposes described above and in our Privacy Policy.

obligations.title: 5. User Obligations
content: 1. Compliance with laws and regulations: You agree to use Peelo Chat in accordance with applicable laws and regulations (in particular those relating to personal data protection, electronic communication and anti-spam).

2. Recipient Consent: Before sending any message via a chatbot or broadcast campaign, you guarantee that you have previously obtained, for each recipient, the explicit and informed consent necessary (opt-in) to receive communications by WhatsApp. You must keep proof of this consent and provide it to Peelo Chat if necessary.

3. Unsubscribe Right (opt-out): You must imperatively offer each recipient a simple, free and permanent way to unsubscribe from your messages (e.g., by replying "STOP", "UNSUBSCRIBE" or via a dedicated web link). Any unsubscribe request must be processed immediately and free of charge.
4. Prohibited Content: It is strictly forbidden to send, via Peelo Chat, messages or create chatbots containing:
- Discriminatory remarks or aimed at encouraging hatred against an individual or a group (racism, sexism, xenophobia, etc.).
- Violent, child pornography content, inciting violence or illegal activities.
- Malicious links (phishing, malware, spam), or any content contrary to IT security standards.
- Unsolicited advertising campaigns (spam), without respect for the recipient's prior consent.
- Defamatory, threatening, obscene content or harming the reputation of a person or a company.

5. Compliance with WhatsApp quotas and best practices: You agree to comply with the limitations and best practices defined by WhatsApp Business API. Any violation may result in the suspension of your account.
6. Security of Credentials: You are responsible for the security of your API keys and passwords.

intellectual_property.title: 6. Intellectual Property
content: 1. Peelo Chat Property: All elements of the Platform are the exclusive property of Peelo Chat.
2. User Contents: You remain the sole holder of intellectual property rights relating to your contents.

privacy.title: 7. Personal Data Processing and Protection
content: 1. Privacy Policy: Peelo Chat provides a separate privacy policy, accessible on the site.
2. GDPR Compliance: Peelo Chat undertakes to comply with the principles of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
3. Data Sharing: Peelo Chat only shares your data in strictly necessary cases (service providers, legal obligations, consent).

acceptable_use.title: 8. Acceptable Use and Best Practices
content: 1. Spam and Sending Limits: Spam is prohibited. Peelo Chat monitors blocking rates.
2. Message Quality: Messages must be clear and compliant with laws.
3. Limitation of Promotional Content: Advertisements require explicit opt-in.

liability.title: 9. Liability and Warranties
content: 1. No Warranty: The Platform is provided "as is".
2. Limitation of Liability: Peelo Chat's liability is limited to the amount of sums paid in the last 12 months.
3. Indemnification: You agree to indemnify Peelo Chat for any claim related to your use.

termination.title: 10. Suspension, Termination and Sanctions
content: In case of violation of the Terms, Peelo Chat may suspend or terminate your account without notice.

changes.title: 11. Evolution of Conditions
content: Peelo Chat may modify these Terms at any time. Users will be notified.

logs.title: 12. Data Ownership and Logs
content: Peelo Chat retains activity logs in accordance with regulations.

misc.title: Miscellaneous Provisions
content: 1. Applicable Law: Senegalese law. Jurisdiction: Dakar.
2. Entire Agreement: These Terms constitute the entire agreement.

appendix.title: Appendix: WhatsApp Code of Conduct
content: Limit sending rate.
Personalization and segmentation of messages.
Management of responses and unsubscribes.
Compliance with authorized sending hours.
